message:
feat(llvm): static LLVM linking for edgeboxc, LTO uses LLVM 20

Changes:
- Link vendored libLLVM-combined.a + libzstd.a into edgeboxc
  (no homebrew LLVM required at runtime)
- LTO optimization uses external LLVM 20 tools (aligns with Zig)
- Remove dynamic LLVM linking from native-static output
- Add llvm_lto.zig wrapper (unused for now, prepared for future)
- Add fib45.js benchmark for testing

Build setup:
- vendor/llvm-lto/lib/libLLVM-combined.a: 208MB combined archive
  (generate with: cat /tmp/llvm18_all_libs.txt | xargs libtool -static -o ...)
- vendor/llvm-lto/lib/libzstd.a: zstd static lib
- vendor/llvm-lto/include/llvm-c/: lto.h headers

Performance: native-static ~3070ms vs WAMR AOT ~2870ms (7% slower)
